quote: We replaced four brittle Zapier chains with one flow. Monthly reconciliation dropped from 6 hours to 45 minutes, and nothing has broken in three months.
name: Ava Chen

quote: Setup took an afternoon. The Salesforce and Slack integrations connected without waiting on our engineering team.
name: Miguel Alvarez

quote: Our CFO signed off after seeing the audit trail and approval gates. It feels safe to automate the boring stuff.
name: Priya N.

quote: We were nervous about edge cases. The conditional logic handled exceptions we used to triage manually.
name: Zoe Park

quote: Error-prone CSV uploads are gone. Ticket backlog dropped 28% in the first month.
name: Tom Riley

quote: We started on the free tier, proved the flow with two teams, and upgraded in month two.
name: Liam Patel

quote: Our previous automations kept failing quietly. Now we get clear alerts and can roll back with one click.
name: Nadia K.

quote: Even non-technical teammates can tweak steps. Changes ship faster and with fewer meetings.
name: Ben Foster
